---
id: send-message
title: "Send Message"
description: "Single public endpoint for sending messages through the gateway. Use the `type` field to indicate the specific Evolution send operation."

api:

  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/send/{instance}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Single public endpoint for sending messages through the gateway. Use the `type` field to indicate the specific Evolution send operation.
